_comment: Copy the 'hackerone' entry into your .claude/settings.json mcpServers section. Public tools need no creds. Authenticated tools read API creds from env (H1_API_USERNAME/H1_API_TOKEN) or ~/.hackerone/creds.json — never put secrets in this file (it is a committed template). To enable the gated submit_report tool, add "env": { "H1_ENABLE_SUBMIT": "1" }.
